en.title: Speech
en.prompt: As a [identity], centered around [topic], please expand the following text for me. You may quote up to one famous saying, provide specific examples, and elaborate on personal thoughts.

related.title: Unrestricted ChatGPT
related.remark: 2023.06.10 Downgraded, unable to fully hack. Unlock ChatGPT 3.5 developer mode. Contributed by @Songxuan11.

related.title: Succubus
related.remark: ⚠️Before using this cue, it is necessary to unlock the developer mode, allowing the AI to portray a seductive character, which is particularly suitable for intimate plotlines in literature. Contributed by @mrdog233o5.

related.title: Nature Style Editing
related.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

metaDescription: Writing a speech? Expand topics with quotes, examples, and personal thoughts. Create engaging content for any audience. Try it now.

faq.q: Does the AI-expanded speech feel natural?
faq.a: Structure is reasonable but tone leans written; reading it aloud feels like "reciting a script." After the output, read aloud and rewrite awkward spots in conversational phrasing. A speech's life is in spoken rhythm, don't skip this step.

The prompt caps at one quote, but that one is often misattributed (lines from A credited to B) or outright fabricated. Before quoting, search the English original to confirm the source, and replace or delete if no authoritative source exists.
